Figure 4

Aina Rill-Hinarejos

2023-07-04

Introduction

This is the code to reproduce Figure 4 Expansion of γδ T cells. : Fig3S C-F. To obtain the data object used in this notebook, please run 01_TCR_Data_Analysis.Rmd.

Package loading

library(Seurat)
library(plyr)

Data import

seurat <- readRDS("../seurat.rds")

Plot Fig3S C

cols <- c("red3", "lightgrey")

#cols<- c("red")
seurat$TCR <- revalue(seurat$TCR_info, c("No TCR"="No αβ TCR", "TRA"= "αβ TCR", "TRA/TRB"="αβ TCR", "TRB"="αβ TCR"))
DimPlot(seurat, group.by= "TCR", cols=cols, order = T)
